title: 500-role ranked search universe (250 federal + 250 private)

fields.vision: 500-role ranked search universe (250 federal + 250 private) is a preserved project packet for this packet converts the user's CIA DO / HUMINT / CI / Russia-Eurasia career goal into a ranked search universe: 250 federal/public purposes and 250 private-sector roles scored against alignment to DO, clearance value, HUMINT/CI tradecraft yield, and suitability for a 34-year-old Georgetown Applied Intelligence graduate with no military service, no clearance, and developing Russian.
fields.mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
fields.source_utilization: Intelligence tradecraft, counterintelligence, and analytic method. Use source library intelligence titles as method authority and intelligence-domain stressors. Vision: Present intelligence pages as disciplined analytic-method and tradecraft demonstrations. Mechanism: Tie claims to collection, covert action, deception, interrogation, bias-control, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Prioritize Capstone, SATS, CI, RAG integrity, and analyst-assurance pages for close-reading. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need method-passage extraction and claim-to-source linkage. Source pool: 60 deduplicated local title candidates; 63 catalogue support rows. Examples: Improving Intelligence Analysis; Leading Intelligence Analysis. Research design, evidence evaluation, forecasting, and judgment. Use source library method and reasoning sources as public method and source background. Vision: Make methodology pages legible as research-design, evidence-control, and interpretive-method systems. Mechanism: Extract argument, warrant, close reading, corpus method, reasoning, evidence, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Strengthen source governance, evidence workbench, capstone, and Nexus method pages. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact methodological passages for claim-control upgrades. Source pool: 129 deduplicated local title candidates; 136 catalogue support rows. Examples: Argumentation; From Human Reasoning to Belief. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors where available. This strengthens page vision, mechanism, source-use, plan...
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. When to reach for this: building a disciplined application pipeline; setting up job alerts for IC and contractor roles; constructing weekly application targets; deciding which resume variant to deploy against which role family. Entry point: 00_README.md — 06_top_25_immediate_targets.md (start here for immediate action) — 01_federal_public_roles_ranked_top_250.csv + 02_private_roles_ranked_top_250.csv (full universe). Integration target: personal application tracker (Excel/Airtable/Notion); job-alert service (LinkedIn/ClearanceJobs/USAJOBS saved searches); weekly Sunday review ritual. Wire or preserve the implementation files: None — pure data/markdown.
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: This packet converts the user's CIA DO / HUMINT / CI / Russia-Eurasia career goal into a ranked search universe: 250 federal/public purposes and 250 private-sector roles scored against alignment to DO, clearance value, HUMINT/CI tradecraft yield, and suitability for a 34-year-old Georgetown Applied Intelligence graduate with no military service, no clearance, and developing Russian. It is a machine-readable companion to the narrative-heavy master roadmap — a systematic target set to drive job alerts, Boolean searches, and a 5–8 applications/day cadence. The core honesty of the packet is stated plainly in the README and status audit: these are strategic target-role labels, not a live vacancy audit. Titles will appear on employer sites under slightly different names; the CSVs are a search priority list, not proof of open reqs. The recommended immediate focus is federal ranks 1-50 plus private ranks 1-50, with a 35-50 applications/week rhythm and weekly...
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: 500-role ranked search universe (250 federal + 250 private) is a preserved project packet for this packet converts the user's CIA DO / HUMINT / CI / Russia-Eurasia career goal into a ranked search universe: 250 federal/public purposes and 250 private-sector roles scored against alignment to DO, clearance value, HUMINT/CI tradecraft yield, and suitability for a 34-year-old Georgetown Applied Intelligence graduate with no military service, no clearance, and developing Russian.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It links regional knowledge to analytic method by preserving source lineage, strategic frame, adversary logic, and claim limits for later Russia/security work.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: blueprint detailed source fields.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.

Research design, evidence evaluation, forecasting, and judgment. Use source library method and reasoning sources as public method and source background. Vision: Make methodology pages legible as research-design, evidence-control, and interpretive-method systems.
instruments.output: a project-specific work product, decision, or proof surface tied to `Leading Intelligence Analysis. Research`

instruments.proof: Leading Intelligence Analysis. Research design, evidence evaluation, forecasting, and judgment. Use source library method and reasoning sources as public method and source background. Vision: Make methodology pages legible as research-design.
instruments.gap: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
